cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees value the variety of roles and learning opportunities available, though some find advancement difficult.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff report positive work-life balance and appreciate the company's employee-friendly approach.

cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Benefits and office environments are frequently cited as positive aspects of the employee experience.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: Supportive leadership and collaborative team dynamics contribute to a positive sense of belonging.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees express satisfaction with the ethical nature of the organization and general job security.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: A subset of employees feels overlooked, citing limited career growth and micromanagement.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Concerns regarding long hours, inadequate pay, and poor insurance coverage are prevalent among some staff.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees report that compensation does not meet industry standards and that project uncertainty affects balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of internal politics and a lack of support during difficult client engagements highlight cultural disconnects.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: High-stress environments and concerns about layoffs based on client stability create feelings of insecurity.
